publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Department of Athletics and Physical Education

did.abstract: Films, video cassettes, and video reels of Cornell basketball games. Includes games with Air Force, Bowling Green, Broome Tech, Brown, Bucknell, Canisius, Carlton, Cleveland State, Clemson, Colgate, Columbia, Dartmouth, Fordham, Harvard, Hofstra, Manhattanville, Niagara, the University of Northern Iowa, Northeastern, Northwestern, Notre Dame, Oklahoma, the University of Pennsylvania, Portugal, Princeton, Rensselaer Polytech, Robert Morris, Rochester, St. Bonaventure, St. Joseph's, Syracuse, Utica, Vermont, and Yale. Includes films of basketball tournaments.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection contains photographs, ephemera, programs, films, video cassettes, and video reels of Cornell basketball games. Includes games with Air Force, Bowling Green, Broome Tech, Brown, Bucknell, Canisius, Carlton, Cleveland State, Clemson, Colgate, Columbia, Dartmouth, Fordham, Harvard, Hofstra, Manhattanville, Niagara, the University of Northern Iowa, Northeastern, Northwestern, Notre Dame, Oklahoma, the University of Pennsylvania, Portugal, Princeton, Rensselaer Polytech, Robert Morris, Rochester, St. Bonaventure, St. Joseph's, Syracuse, Utica, Vermont, and Yale. Includes films of basketball tournaments. Ephemera includes sign created on March 26 by Olin Library Access Services employees, Michelle Hubbell, Debbie Cook, and Michelle Nair for the Welcome Rally for the basketball team, signed by the players. Sign created by Libe Cafe employees. Ticket stubs from the Carrier Dome game, with a letter from Ezra Cornell describing the event. NCAA 2010 Basketball Championships, East Regional, Program from the Carrier Dome game and special edition of the Daily Orange, 2010. Also, programs and tickets from the 2013-2014 season and a picture of the 1934 team.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Basketball collection, #40-3-3120. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Collection #40-3-3810, Cornell Basketball Memorabilia, was merged into this collection in 2023.
